hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/bin/ruff format "$f" && /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/bin/ruff check --fix --exit-zero "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(rm|unlink|del).*spendly\.db'; then echo 'ERROR: Deleting spendly.db is not allowed. This is the live database for the Spendly app. If you need a fresh DB, run flask shell and call init_db() instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
